title: Mergeable 'if' Statements Should Be Combined
description: Nested code blocks increase complexity. Maintain code readability by merging 'if' statements where possible. This reduces unnecessary nesting and enhances code readability.
recommendation: Combine condition1 and condition2 into a single 'if' statement like 'if (condition1 && condition2)'.
impact: Improves code readability by reducing complexity and unnecessary nesting.
